name: endnote-local-adapter
description: Unofficial read-only adapter for local EndNote libraries, references, attachments, and indexed PDF text.

interface.shortDescription: Search a licensed local EndNote library
interface.longDescription: Unofficial, unaffiliated read-only MCP adapter for user-configured local EndNote libraries. It searches citation metadata, inspects references and attachments, and queries an existing local PDF full-text index without modifying the library.
defaultPrompt: Search my local EndNote library for papers about superconductivity.
Find locally attached PDFs that mention Berry curvature.
Show the attachments for this local EndNote reference.
